changelog: v2.2.5: SSH pool stability overhaul for CDN-fronted tunnels. Default to single SSH session (commercial-VPN-style channel multiplexing) — fixes 302 storms on Cloudflare. Keepalive 15s/20s (was 60s) — fires before CDN idle timer. Pool reconnects no longer evict DNS cache on 302 (per-conn rate-limit, not DNS). HyperOS rmnet bearer rotation no longer triggers pool rebuilds. Staggered reconnects (750ms apart) avoid synchronized CDN hits.
